event: Garden pavilion sketch for opera set design
description: A loose watercolor sketch of a green neoclassical garden pavilion with arched entrance, flanking columns, and a pediment with decorative elements. Tall birch trees with white trunks and green-gold foliage frame the building on both sides. A small figure stands near the entrance. The palette is dominated by greens, with touches of warm brown and golden light filtering through the leaves. The style is impressionistic and quickly rendered.

_meta.title: The Larin's Garden. Sketch of set for P. Tchaikovsky's opera
